API 设计笔记 | API Design Notes
================================

核心接口 Core Interfaces
-------------------------

源管理 Source Management:
  POST   /api/sources          — 添加新源 Add new source
  GET    /api/sources          — 列出所有源 List all sources
  GET    /api/sources/:id      — 获取源详情 Get source details
  PUT    /api/sources/:id      — 更新源配置 Update source config
  DELETE /api/sources/:id      — 删除源 Delete source

搜索 Search:
  POST   /api/search           — 执行搜索 Execute search
  GET    /api/search/suggest   — 搜索建议 Search suggestions

证据 Evidence:
  GET    /api/evidence/:id     — 获取证据卡片 Get evidence card
  POST   /api/evidence/export  — 导出证据 Export evidence

Playbook:
  POST   /api/playbooks        — 创建剧本 Create playbook
  GET    /api/playbooks        — 列出剧本 List playbooks
  PUT    /api/playbooks/:id    — 更新剧本 Update playbook
  POST   /api/playbooks/:id/citations — 添加引用 Add citation

IPC 命令设计 IPC Command Design (Tauri)
-----------------------------------------

由于这是桌面应用，实际使用 Tauri IPC 而非 HTTP:
Since this is a desktop app, we use Tauri IPC instead of HTTP:

  invoke('add_source', { path: '/path/to/vault', name: 'My Vault' })
  invoke('search', { query: '搜索关键词', filters: {} })
  invoke('get_evidence', { chunkId: 'uuid-here' })

数据流 Data Flow:
  用户输入 User Input
    → Tauri IPC 调用
    → Rust 命令处理
    → SQLite FTS5 查询
    → 结果排序与高亮
    → 返回前端渲染
    → User sees evidence cards

错误处理策略 Error Handling Strategy
--------------------------------------

所有 IPC 命令返回 Result<T, AppError> 格式:
All IPC commands return Result<T, AppError> format:

  成功 Success: { data: T, status: "ok" }
  失败 Failure: { error: string, code: string, status: "error" }

错误码 Error Codes:
  E001 — 数据库连接失败 Database connection failed
  E002 — 源路径不存在 Source path not found
  E003 — 文件权限不足 Insufficient file permissions
  E004 — 索引损坏 Index corrupted
  E005 — 查询语法错误 Query syntax error
